title: 💧 Watering Tips
description: Water the plant when the top 1 inch of soil is dry. Overwatering can cause root rot, so make sure the drainage is good. In summer, water 2-3 times per week and in winter, 1-2 times per week is sufficient.

title: ☀️ Sunlight Needs
description: Most indoor plants prefer indirect sunlight. Place them near a window for optimal growth. Avoid direct sunlight as it can burn the leaves.

title: 🌱 Fertilizing Guide
description: Use organic fertilizer or liquid fertilizer once a month. Excess fertilizer can burn leaf tips, so apply sparingly.

title: 🪴 Repotting
description: Repot your plant every 1-2 years. Ensure good drainage in the new pot and choose a slightly larger pot than the previous one for the plant to grow comfortably.

title: 🧼 Pest Control
description: If you see small insects or spots under the leaves, spray with mild soapy water. You can also use natural insecticides if needed.

title: 🌡️ Temperature & Humidity
description: Most indoor plants prefer temperatures between 18°C to 25°C. Maintain room humidity by occasionally spraying water or using a humidifier.

title: 🍂 Pruning & Cleaning
description: Trim dry or damaged leaves. Occasionally clean the leaves with a damp cloth to help them absorb light properly.

title: 💨 Air Circulation
description: Ensure gentle air movement around your plants. This helps prevent fungi and keeps the plant fresh.

title: 🌸 Flowering & Blooming
description: For flowering, provide adequate light and proper fertilization. Apply liquid fertilizer once a week and prune branches or leaves as needed. Avoid exposing flowers to direct hot or cold air.
